title: JEECUP Exam Date 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: JEECUP Exam Date 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: JEECUP Exam Date 2026 Out for UP Polytechnic entrance test on the official website - jeecup.admissions.nic.in for the 2026-27 academic session. Check the direct link here and the steps to download the JEECUP 2026 admit card and view your exam schedule and result online.

content.text: The Joint Entrance Examination Council, Uttar Pradesh (JEECUP) has officially announced the JEECUP Exam Date 2026 for the state level UP Polytechnic entrance exam for the 2026-27 academic session. The computer based test (CBT) will be held from 15 May 2026 to 22 May 2026 for various diploma courses in engineering, technology, pharmacy and other polytechnic programmes offered by institutes across Uttar Pradesh. JEECUP Exam Date 2026 has been released online on the official website - jeecup.admissions.nic.in.

Candidates seeking admission to government, aided and private polytechnic colleges in UP through JEECUP 2026 can check their exam schedule, city intimation, admit card download link and result date using their application number and password on the official portal. After downloading their admit card or result, aspirants are advised to carefully verify their personal details, exam date, shift and centre, and immediately contact the JEECUP authorities in case of any discrepancy.

JEECUP Exam Date 2026 has been announced for the UP Polytechnic entrance exam for admission to diploma courses in engineering, technology, pharmacy and related fields in Uttar Pradesh. The computer based examination will be conducted between 15 May 2026 and 22 May 2026, while the result is scheduled for release on or around 30 May 2026 through the official website jeecup.admissions.nic.in. Candidates can access their exam schedule, admit card and result online using their JEECUP 2026 login credentials for the 2026-27 academic session.

rows: JEECUP 2026 - Uttar Pradesh Joint Entrance Examination (Polytechnic)
Joint Entrance Examination Council, Uttar Pradesh (JEECUP)
State level entrance exam for diploma and polytechnic courses in UP
Diploma in Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy and other polytechnic programmes

content.text: The exam conducting authority activates separate direct links for JEECUP 2026 exam schedule, city intimation, admit card download and result on the official website jeecup.admissions.nic.in. Candidates who have successfully registered for JEECUP Exam 2026 can click on these links, log in with their application number and password and instantly view their exam date, shift, centre details, as well as download their admit card and scorecard. By using the JEECUP 2026 direct links given below, students can quickly access the UP Polytechnic exam date notice, admit card and result without searching through multiple pages on the portal.

links.label: JEECUP Exam Date 2026 Notice (UP Polytechnic CBT schedule)

sections.heading: How to Check JEECUP Exam Date 2026 and Result

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your JEECUP Exam Date 2026, download the admit card and view the result online on the official website.

items: Visit the official JEECUP website jeecup.admissions.nic.in using a browser on your mobile or desktop.
On the homepage, go to the latest notification or candidate activity section and click on the relevant JEECUP 2026 link such as exam date notice, admit card or result.
A login page will open where you must enter your JEECUP 2026 application number, password or date of birth as required.
After entering the correct details, click on the submit or login button to access your dashboard.
Your JEECUP exam schedule, allotted exam date and shift or result scorecard will be displayed on the screen.
Carefully check all details including your name, roll number, exam centre and timing, and then download and save the PDF or take a printout for future reference.

structured_links.label: JEECUP Exam Date 2026 Notice (UP Polytechnic CBT schedule)
